join6529.metadata.title: Join 6529
join6529.metadata.description: A compact onboarding hub for finding the right way into 6529: Waves, collecting NFTs, subscriptions, and creating or contributing.
join6529.title: Join 6529
join6529.subtitle: A practical starting point for 6529. Choose how you want to enter: read and post in Waves, collect NFTs, learn subscriptions, or create and contribute.
join6529.hero.note.title: Start without pressure
join6529.hero.note.body: You can browse first. Wallets, profiles, ETH, and eligibility only matter when you take actions such as posting, creating, subscribing, or minting.
join6529.entry.heading: Pick the doorway that matches your intent
join6529.entry.subheading: 6529 is an app for conversations, art, collecting, identity, and coordination. These paths get you into the parts people usually need first.
join6529.entry.waves.title: Join Waves
join6529.entry.waves.body: Read public conversations, follow active threads, and participate when your wallet and profile are ready.
join6529.entry.nfts.title: Collect NFTs
join6529.entry.nfts.body: Browse The Memes and related media surfaces before deciding whether any active mint or marketplace action fits you.
join6529.entry.subscriptions.title: Use subscriptions
join6529.entry.subscriptions.body: Learn how optional The Memes subscriptions work before setting or funding subscription preferences.
join6529.entry.create.title: Create or contribute
join6529.entry.create.body: Create a Wave, submit into open calls, vote, reply, or help shape a conversation from inside the product.
join6529.flow.heading: Joining is a set of product actions, not one mandatory funnel
join6529.flow.subheading: The app lets you move from reading to participating at the moment you need more identity or on-chain capability.
join6529.flow.browse.title: Browse first
join6529.flow.browse.body: Explore public pages, Waves, The Memes, activity, and docs before connecting anything.
join6529.flow.wallet.title: Connect a wallet
join6529.flow.wallet.body: Wallet connection lets 6529 recognize your account for app actions and on-chain flows.
join6529.flow.profile.title: Create a profile
join6529.flow.profile.body: A profile gives you a handle and unlocks core participation surfaces such as posting in eligible Waves.
join6529.flow.participate.title: Act when eligible
join6529.flow.participate.body: Post, vote, create, subscribe, or mint only when the specific Wave, drop, or subscription flow allows it.
join6529.focus.heading: The three areas most new users ask about
join6529.focus.subheading: These are the high-signal parts to understand before you start spending time or ETH.
join6529.focus.waves.title: Waves
join6529.focus.waves.body: Waves are where 6529 conversations, submissions, voting, and coordination happen.
join6529.focus.waves.point.read: Public Waves can be explored before you post.
join6529.focus.waves.point.profile: Posting and many write actions require a connected wallet and profile.
join6529.focus.waves.point.create: Creating a Wave is available from the Waves route when profile context is available.
join6529.focus.nfts.title: NFTs
join6529.focus.nfts.body: The Memes and related media pages are the main places to browse, inspect, and follow collection activity.
join6529.focus.nfts.point.browse: Browsing art, editions, references, and ownership context does not require a mint commitment.
join6529.focus.nfts.point.mint: Mint controls depend on the active drop, phase, wallet state, and eligibility.
join6529.focus.nfts.point.careful: No page can guarantee a mint; wallet confirmation, gas, supply, and eligibility still apply.
join6529.focus.subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
join6529.focus.subscriptions.body: The Memes subscriptions are optional controls for eligible profile owners who want subscription-based minting support.
join6529.focus.subscriptions.point.optio: Subscriptions are not required to browse, read Waves, or inspect media.
join6529.focus.subscriptions.point.profi: Subscription controls live on profile subscription pages when available.
join6529.focus.subscriptions.point.eth: Top-ups use ETH on the configured chain and should be checked carefully before sending.
join6529.faq.heading: Beginner questions
join6529.faq.subheading: Short answers for the choices that usually slow people down.
join6529.faq.wallet.question: Do I need a wallet?
join6529.faq.wallet.answer: Not to browse many public surfaces. You need a connected wallet for identity-sensitive actions such as profile setup, posting, creating, voting, subscribing, and minting.
join6529.faq.eth.question: Do I need ETH?
join6529.faq.eth.answer: Only for flows that spend or move value, such as minting, gas, or subscription top-ups. Reading, browsing, and learning do not require ETH.
join6529.faq.profile.question: Why create a 6529 profile?
join6529.faq.profile.answer: A profile gives you a handle and app identity. It is required for many participation flows, including posting in eligible Waves and managing profile-owned settings.
join6529.faq.browse.question: Can I just look around first?
join6529.faq.browse.answer: Yes. Start with Waves or The Memes, learn the product language, and connect a wallet only when you decide to participate.
